ksa_text: Manage the data and AI investment portfolio, including initiative prioritization, funding allocation, performance tracking against value hypotheses, portfolio rebalancing based on realized outcomes, and resource allocation decisions.

dcwf.top_element_label: Develop a data management strategy that helps to prioritize investments and resource allocations (e.g., data analytics, data infrastructure).

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4274, domain LS, scope weak fit. High confidence.
